scripts.build: turbo run build:tsc build:vite && echo build completed successfully || (echo Please fix build errors and run pnpm run build to check for remaining build issues && exit 1)
scripts.build:tsc: tsc -b && echo build:tsc completed successfully || (echo Please fix type errors and run pnpm run build:tsc to check for remaining type issues && exit 1)
scripts.build:vite: vite build && echo build:vite completed successfully || (echo Please fix build errors and run pnpm run build:vite to check for remaining build issues && exit 1)
scripts.check: turbo run lint:types lint:format lint:issues lint:rules build:tsc build:vite test:unit test:e2e && echo check completed successfully
scripts.lint: turbo run lint:types lint:format lint:issues && echo lint completed successfully
scripts.lint:format: oxfmt --check && echo lint:format completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:format:fix to automatically fix formatting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:format:fix: oxfmt --write && echo lint:format:fix completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:format to check for remaining formatting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:issues: oxlint --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives && echo lint:issues completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:issues:fix to automatically fix linting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:issues:fix: oxlint --fix --fix-suggestions --fix-dangerously --type-aware --deny-warnings --report-unused-disable-directives && echo lint:issues:fix completed successfully || (echo Please run pnpm run lint:issues to check for remaining linting issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:rules: bun src/bin/lint.cli.ts && echo lint:rules completed successfully || (echo Please fix rule issues && exit 1)
scripts.lint:types: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && echo lint:types completed successfully || (echo Please fix type errors and run pnpm run lint:types to check for remaining type issues && exit 1)
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test && echo test:e2e completed successfully || (echo Please fix e2e test errors and run pnpm run test:e2e to check for remaining test issues && exit 1)
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --coverage && echo test:unit completed successfully || (echo Please fix test errors and run pnpm run test:unit to check for remaining test issues && exit 1)
scripts.up:deps: pnpm update --latest && echo up:deps completed successfully
